message:
test(lifecycle): first matrix row — concurrent health readings agree (ibuuh.23)

Ships the cheapest meaningful multi-actor assertion under ibuuh.23's
lifecycle validation matrix scope: three concurrent cass health --json
invocations against the same isolated data dir must all return byte-
identical readiness JSON (modulo the already-scrubbed live kernel
metrics). Proves the readiness snapshot is idempotent under process-
level concurrency — a prerequisite invariant the rest of the matrix
will build on.

This is the FIRST ROW of the matrix, not the whole thing. Future rows
(pause/resume under pressure, quarantine transitions, retention-safety,
long-running maintenance coordination) need the scheduler / cleanup /
quarantine subsystems that are multi-day scope downstream of in-flight
ibuuh.30 / ibuuh.32 work. Documented accordingly in the module comment.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test lifecycle_matrix: 1/1 pass, 3 consecutive stable re-
runs all 1/1.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; keeps the bead
open for the remaining matrix rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
